entry.description: Allow smb from Internal to DMZ

entry.description: Allow smb from External to DMZ

entry.description: Allow ntp from DMZ to External

entry.description: Allow web-browsing from External to DMZ

entry.description: Allow ftp from Internal to External

entry.name: P000-Deny-All-Cleanup
entry.description: Cleanup rule — deny and log all unmatched traffic
